    ‎backend/server.py‎

    Copy file name to clipboard
    +89Lines changed: 89 additions & 0 deletions
    Original file line numberDiff line numberDiff line change
    @@ -0,0 +1,89 @@
    1+
    from fastapi import FastAPI, APIRouter
    2+
    from dotenv import load_dotenv
    3+
    from starlette.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
    4+
    from motor.motor_asyncio import AsyncIOMotorClient
    5+
    import os
    6+
    import logging
    7+
    from pathlib import Path
    8+
    from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ConfigDict
    9+
    from typing import List
    10+
    import uuid
    11+
    from datetime import datetime, timezone
    12+
    13+
    14+
    ROOT_DIR = Path(__file__).parent
    15+
    load_dotenv(ROOT_DIR / '.env')
    16+
    17+
    # MongoDB connection
    18+
    mongo_url = os.environ['MONGO_URL']
    19+
    client = AsyncIOMotorClient(mongo_url)
    20+
    db = client[os.environ['DB_NAME']]
    21+
    22+
    # Create the main app without a prefix
    23+
    app = FastAPI()
    24+
    25+
    # Create a router with the /api prefix
    26+
    api_router = APIRouter(prefix="/api")
    27+
    28+
    29+
    # Define Models
    30+
    class StatusCheck(BaseModel):
    31+
    model_config = ConfigDict(extra="ignore") # Ignore MongoDB's _id field
    32+
    33+
    id: str = Field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    34+
    client_name: str
    35+
    timestamp: datetime = Field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc))
    36+
    37+
    class StatusCheckCreate(BaseModel):
    38+
    client_name: str
    39+
    40+
    # Add your routes to the router instead of directly to app
    41+
    @api_router.get("/")
    42+
    async def root():
    43+
    return {"message": "Hello World"}
    44+
    45+
    @api_router.post("/status", response_model=StatusCheck)
    46+
    async def create_status_check(input: StatusCheckCreate):
    47+
    status_dict = input.model_dump()
    48+
    status_obj = StatusCheck(**status_dict)
    49+
    50+
    # Convert to dict and serialize datetime to ISO string for MongoDB
    51+
    doc = status_obj.model_dump()
    52+
    doc['timestamp'] = doc['timestamp'].isoformat()
    53+
    54+
    _ = await db.status_checks.insert_one(doc)
    55+
    return status_obj
    56+
    57+
    @api_router.get("/status", response_model=List[StatusCheck])
    58+
    async def get_status_checks():
    59+
    # Exclude MongoDB's _id field from the query results
    60+
    status_checks = await db.status_checks.find({}, {"_id": 0}).to_list(1000)
    61+
    62+
    # Convert ISO string timestamps back to datetime objects
    63+
    for check in status_checks:
    64+
    if isinstance(check['timestamp'], str):
    65+
    check['timestamp'] = datetime.fromisoformat(check['timestamp'])
    66+
    67+
    return status_checks
    68+
    69+
    # Include the router in the main app
    70+
    app.include_router(api_router)
    71+
    72+
    app.add_middleware(
    73+
    CORSMiddleware,
    74+
    allow_credentials=True,
    75+
    allow_origins=os.environ.get('CORS_ORIGINS', '*').split(','),
    76+
    allow_methods=["*"],
    77+
    allow_headers=["*"],
    78+
    )
    79+
    80+
    # Configure logging
    81+
    logging.basicConfig(
    82+
    level=logging.INFO,
    83+
    format='%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s'
    84+
    )
    85+
    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    86+
    87+
    @app.on_event("shutdown")
    88+
    async def shutdown_db_client():
    89+
    client.close()
    Collapse file

    41+
    "layout_and_spacing": {
    42+
    "spacing_scale": "Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16, py-24, py-32 for sections.",
    43+
    "container": "max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8",
    44+
    "grid_strategy": "Control Room / Swiss Grid hybrid. Avoid symmetric boring cards. Use varied span ratios for the services bento grid (e.g., col-span-2 for primary services, col-span-1 for secondary).",
    45+
    "surface_strategy": {
    46+
    "cards": "Solid background (#FFFFFF), sharp 1px borders (border-border_subtle), no shadow by default, subtle shadow-lg and -translate-y-1 on hover.",
    47+
    "header": "Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80, 1px subtle bottom border. z-50 sticky.",
    48+
    "emergency_banner": "Retro-Futurism/Terminal look: Deep black/navy background (#0A1128), neon accent text (#00A3FF)."
    49+
    }
    50+
    },
    51+
    "components": {
    52+
    "buttons": {
    53+
    "primary": "bg-primary_brand text-white hover:bg-accent_electric transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-semibold",
    54+
    "secondary": "bg-white text-primary_brand border border-primary_brand hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-semibold",
    55+
    "accent": "bg-accent_electric text-white hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-semibold"
    56+
    },
    57+
    "hero_overlay": "bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0A1128]/90 via-[#0A1128]/60 to-transparent for text readability while letting the image breathe.",
    58+
    "testimonials": "Editorial feel. Use large font-light for the quote, high contrast, immense negative space.",
    59+
    "forms": "Use Shadcn customized inputs. Square corners, 1px border, focus:ring-accent_electric."
    60+
    },
    61+
    "motion": {
    62+
    "hover_states": "All interactive elements MUST have transition-transform or transition-colors.",
    63+
    "scroll_animations": "Use staggered fade-up for grid items. Subtle parallax on hero image."
    64+
    },
    65+
    "icons_and_assets": {
    66+
    "library": "lucide-react for standard icons. Consider @phosphor-icons/react for high-end duotone feel if needed."
    67+
    },
    68+
    "testing": {
    69+
    "requirements": "All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button')."
    70+
    },
    71+
    "image_urls": {
    72+
    "hero_background": {
    73+
    "url": "https://images.pexels.com/photos/6419128/pexels-photo-6419128.jpeg",
    74+
    "description": "High-quality close-up of plumber's hands installing steel pipes. Use as the main hero background with the specified dark navy gradient overlay."
    75+
    },
    76+
    "about_section": {
    77+
    "url": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1635221798248-8a3452ad07cd",
    78+
    "description": "Portrait of a mature male worker leaning against a wall, representing the veteran/family-owned trustworthy plumber."
    79+
    },
    80+
    "service_water_heater": {
    81+
    "url": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1676210134190-3f2c0d5cf58d",
    82+
    "description": "Man fixing a water heater in a room. Use in the services grid."
    83+
    },
    84+
    "service_fixtures": {
    85+
    "url": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1758548157466-7c454382035a",
    86+
    "description": "Luxury modern bathroom with marble and a bathtub. Use to showcase fixture installation service."
    87+
    },
    88+
    "emergency_banner_bg": {
    89+
    "url": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1675973839743-64eb985b0184",
    90+
    "description": "Abstract dark water and rocks. Use as a background texture for the 24/7 Emergency banner."
    91+
    },
    92+
    "trust_badges": [
    93+
    {
    94+
    "url": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1586867026567-b9b63ae58472",
    95+
    "description": "Marshall brand logo. Use as a dummy sponsor/partner logo in the trust badges section (apply grayscale/opacity)."
    96+
    },
    97+
    {
    98+
    "url": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1644166186783-35d911470ff0",
    99+
    "description": "Mercedes emblem. Use as a dummy sponsor/partner logo in the trust badges section (apply grayscale/opacity)."
    100+
    },
    101+
    {
    102+
    "url": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1758560902402-0785e1ff77db",
    103+
    "description": "Coca-cola logo. Use as a dummy sponsor/partner logo in the trust badges section (apply grayscale/opacity filter to make it look like a unified partner row)."
    104+
    }
    105+
    ]
    106+
    },
    107+
    "instructions_to_main_agent": [
    108+
    "Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or generic sans-serif for headings. Use Clash Display or a similar premium architectural font from Google Fonts (e.g., Cabinet Grotesk, Syne is banned, so stick to Outfit or Space Grotesk if Clash isn't available, or inject Clash Display via CDN).",
    109+
    "Ensure the design does not look like a generic SaaS site. This is a premium home service company.",
    110+
    "Implement the 'Crystal Glass' header. It must float above the content with a high backdrop-blur and a 1px subtle bottom border.",
    111+
    "For the hero section, do not use a flat blanket black overlay. Use the specified gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0A1128]/90 via-[#0A1128]/60 to-transparent) so the image is visible on the right side.",
    112+
    "Use generous padding. Standard sections should be py-24 or py-32.",
    113+
    "Implement a bento-style grid for the 'Services' section. Mix col-span-1 and col-span-2 to create asymmetry. Avoid perfectly uniform squares.",
    114+
    "The 24/7 Emergency Banner should be highly contrasting. Deep navy (#0A1128) with Electric Cerulean (#00A3FF) highlights.",
    115+
    "Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, form inputs, and major sections.",
    116+
    "Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural marketing layouts. Only use Shadcn for forms or complex interactive pieces.",
    117+
    "Never use placeholder image services. Use ONLY the URLs provided in the image_urls section."
    118+
    ]
    119+
    }
